body:
Adds Schar mountain experiment configurations to CI build (Stretched and Uniform configurations)
Adds Agnesi mountain experiment to CI build (Stretched configuration) 
Adds initial conditions and orography profile follos Schar et al. (2002).
Updates CLI info. Updates cl-args for Agnesi test case. 

```
            modified:   .buildkite/pipeline.yml

```
Closes #1433
title: High resolution Schar test case
